features: 75 Pack Dental Floss Sticks D Shape Tooth Floss Picks Premium Polymer Threads Easy To Use, Durable Portable Flossing
description: Product description Pristine Gleam Is A Leading Dental Hygiene Brand. Superior Without The Hefty Price Tag Pristine Gleam Dental Floss Stick Threads Are Made From Superior Polymer Threads. They Are Resilient And Relatively Flexible, Which Means They Apply Less Friction To Your Teeth And Minimize Friction Damage. The Threads Do Not Break Or Pill Easily And Are Not Prone To Rippling And Breakage, Just Like Top Brands. Easy To Use Dental Floss Sticks In Themselves Are Already Easy To Use. But We Thought We Could Do It A Little Better. The Frame That Holds The Floss Is Made Of High Density Plastic, Making It More Durable And Giving You Enough Support Tension. This Means A Floss Stick That Is Much Easier To Use While Cleaning Your Teeth From Every Angle. Directions 1. Pull out about 1.5 inches of floss from the container. 2. Wrap around your middle finger, leaving an inch or two to work with. 3. Curve each tooth, gently moving it up and down against side tooth. 4. Unwind used finger as you move next 5. Use a new section for tooth avoid reinserting bacteria into mouth. Safety Warning Do not swallow. Consult a dentist if you have specific dental conditions. See more
